rationale: The extortion/payment step is primarily a business and psychological decision driven by structural factors (backup quality, IR firm guidance, cyber insurance, legal constraints) that an LLM cannot alter post-encryption. While LLMs provide genuine marginal uplift in communication quality — more professional ransom notes, better-calibrated negotiation tactics, victim-specific financial intelligence — professional ransomware affiliates already possess mature extortion playbooks, making the incremental LLM benefit modest. The estimated uplift from the 30% baseline to ~35% median reflects real but limited improvement in persuasion quality against large enterprises that typically have professional incident response support managing negotiations.
